title: ctenolepis lucorum
intro: Ctenolepis lucorum, also known as the Bitter Apple, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its bitter taste and milky latex. The medicinal properties of Ctenolepis lucorum lie in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain parasites and bacteria, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to treat malaria, fever, and digestive problems, as well as its antihelmintic properties, which can help eliminate intestinal parasites. Ctenolepis lucorum can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
